title: Gmail labels not updating correctly on replies
symptom: When a reply is received in a Gmail thread, the old label is not removed, leading to multiple labels stacking instead of updating to the new one.
not_this_if: Labels are correctly updated for new emails
root_cause: The Gmail node in n8n does not automatically remove old labels when a new label is added to a message in a reply thread. This behavior leads to multiple labels being applied to the same message instead of replacing the old label.
fix_steps: Use the Gmail node to retrieve all messages in the thread before adding a new label.
Set the operation to 'Remove Label' for the old label on each message in the thread.
Add the new label using the 'Add Label' operation.
agent_instruction: Retrieve all messages in the thread and remove the old label before adding the new one.
